case_title: CORSIA J. LEE VS. FRED NEW SR.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,590.00 FILED BY LEE, CORSIA J. AS TO DEFENDANT NEW SR., FRED ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-24-2009 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY DEFENDANT NEW SR., FRED

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LEE, CORSIA J. IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT NEW SR., FRED THE COURT DETERMINES THAT PLAINTIFF WAS NOT DEFENDANT'S TENANT, BUT A LICENSEE; SUCH THAT DEFENDANT WAS NOT REQUIRED TO FILE AN UNLAWFUL DETAINER ACTION. HOWEVER, DEFENDANT SHALL COOPERATE WITH PLAINTIFF TO RETURN ANY PERSONAL BELONGING THAT REMAIN ON DEFENDANT'S PREMISES. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
SUBPOENA DUCES TECUM ISSUED TO FRED NEW SR.
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-20-2009 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-20-2009 BY PAUL SLAVIT. APPEARANCE BY BOTH PARTIES. EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68511.3 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF LEE, CORSIA J. ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO CRC 3.50 - 3.63
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-24-2009 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO AUG-13-2009 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506, PER JUDGE PRO TEM JEAN MILEFF. COPY MAILED TO PARTIES.
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE JUDGE PRO TEM RUSSELL DAVIS FILED BY LEE, CORSIA J. NEW SR., FRED
CONTINUANCE ORDER RETURNED UNDELIVERED. SENT TO PLAINTIFF.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-13-2009 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO AUG-20-2009 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY BOTH PARTIES. JUDGE PRO TEM: RUSSELL DAVIS. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED NOV-02-2009 ORDERED DESTROYED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED JUN-16-2009, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT NEW SR., FRED
ORDER ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE DATED JULY 10, 2009.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-20-2009 - JUDGMENT.
